biofunc.bed¶

biofunc.bed.load_bed(path: str, header=True) → DataFrame¶

load BED file as pandas DataFrame

Parameters:

  • path – path to BED file

  • header (bool) – look for .header file in same directory

biofunc.bed.save_bed(df: DataFrame, out: str) → None¶

save pandas dataframe as a BED file and header file

Parameters:

  • df (pd.DataFrame) – dataframe

  • out (str) – output filename

biofunc
